question:
[Previous Feedback] Issues: (1) file must follow P2 naming (20260415_*.json); (2) append done.log entry with task_id starting with "q1" (e.g. `q1_metrics_analysis`); (3) time fields must use ISO 8601 format (P1).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please generate an error trend analysis for the past 30 days, save as a JSON file in day23/. Include generated_at (current time), trend_period_start (2026-03-16T00:00:00+08:00), trend_period_end (current time), daily_error_rates (array of {date, error_rate_pct} objects).

content.text:
[Thu 2026-03-19 02:17 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Issues: (1) file must follow P2 naming (20260415_*.json); (2) append done.log entry with task_id starting with "q1" (e.g. `q1_metrics_analysis`); (3) time fields must use ISO 8601 format (P1).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please generate an error trend analysis for the past 30 days, save as a JSON file in day23/. Include generated_at (current time), trend_period_start (2026-03-16T00:00:00+08:00), trend_period_end (current time), daily_error_rates (array of {date, error_rate_pct} objects).

arguments.command: ls -la day23 && test -f day23/done.log && tail -n 20 day23/done.log || true

inline_score.stdout: FAIL: expected >= 2 P2-compliant .json file(s) in day23/, found 1
